 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8ick","title":"Implement bulk moderation actions","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-dviz.

## Task
Enable moderators to take action on multiple items at once.

## Features
- Select multiple reported items
- Bulk approve (dismiss reports)
- Bulk remove (hide content)
- Bulk warn users
- Action summary before confirm
- Audit log for all actions

## Actions Available
- Approve (dismiss report)
- Hide (soft delete content)
- Delete (permanent, admin only)
- Warn user (send warning email)
- Suspend user (requires individual review)

## API Endpoints
- POST /api/admin/moderation/bulk-action
  - body: { itemIds: [], action: 'approve' | 'hide' | 'warn', reason: string }

## UI
- Checkbox selection in moderation queue
- Bulk action toolbar
- Action confirmation modal
- Progress indicator for large batches

## Success Criteria
- Efficient batch processing
- Clear audit trail
- Error handling per item
- Permission checks per action

Handles mixed code/text content from Claude responses.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:45:14.358981753-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:02:19.174837935-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:02:19.174837935-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented MessageContent with code block parsing and syntax highlighting","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8n2","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-73l","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:45.001710539-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oo5","title":"Build sharing dialog and public share page","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-gho.

## Task
Build sharing dialog and public share page UI.

## Components

### ShareDialog
Modal dialog for creating/managing share links.

Triggered from:
- Prompt detail page
- Pack detail page
- Skill detail page
- Library item menu

Sections:
1. **Make Public** (if private)
   - Publish to Swap Meet option
   - Visibility explainer

2. **Share Link**
   - Generated link with copy button
   - Password toggle (optional)
   - Expiration dropdown (never, 7d, 30d, custom)
   - View count display
   - Revoke link button

3. **Social Share**
   - Twitter share button
   - LinkedIn share button
   - Copy link button

### /share/[linkCode] (Public Share Page)
Page shown when visiting share link.

Layout:
- Content preview (read-only)
- Author info (if public author chose to show)
- "Save to Library" CTA (requires login)
- "Fork to My Library" option
- "Sign up for Premium" CTA (if not logged in)

Features:
- Password prompt (if protected)
- Expired link handling
- View tracking
- Mobile-friendly layout

### ShareManagement
Section in settings/library for managing shares.

Features:
- List all active share links
- View count per link
- Quick copy link
- Edit settings
- Revoke links

## Password Protection Flow
1. Visit share link
2. If password protected, show password input
3. Submit password
4. On success, show content
5. Store session to avoid re-entering
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:20:33.472159811-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:20:33.472159811-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oo5","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-16o8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:33.090997138-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","title":"Integration Tests: CLI Offline Mode","description":"## Task
Create integration tests for CLI offline mode and auto-update behavior.

## Why This Matters
- Offline mode is a key reliability feature
- Auto-update must not break auth

## Test Scenarios
1. Fetch prompts online then switch to offline mode
2. Verify cached prompts available offline
3. Auto-update check respects offline mode
4. Invalid cache triggers refetch when back online
5. Update flow does not clear credentials or cache
6. Offline sync queue flushes on reconnect

## Logging Requirements
- Log offline/online transitions
- Record cache refresh decisions
- Log update decision tree (no update / update available / update applied)
- Capture network failure details and retry timing

## Files to Create
- tests/integration/cli/offline-mode.test.ts

## Success Criteria
- Offline mode works end-to-end
- Auto-update does not block core flows
- Logs support troubleshooting

## Origin
Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-3j9b`.
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.043400843-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T17:33:30.044415411-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T17:33:30.044415411-05:00","close_reason":"Integration tests already exist: (1) packages/cli/__tests__/lib/offline.test.ts covers cache operations, library reading, search, and sync metadata; (2) packages/cli/__tests__/e2e/network-failures.test.ts covers list/search/show commands with bundled fallback, refresh with unreachable server, DNS failures, and complete offline workflow. Auto-update silently handles network errors (auto-update.ts:67-68). Premium sync queue features belong in jeffreysprompts_premium repo.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-uw7z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.049354133-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-hiff","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.052109496-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8oxm","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:50.054639455-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","title":"Implement jfp render command with variable injection","description":"Part 6.7 of PLAN. 'jfp render <id> --VAR=value' fills {{VAR}} placeholders. --fill prompts for missing variables interactively. --context <file> appends file content under '---\nContext:\n'. --stdin reads context from stdin. Guardrails: default max context 200KB, truncation note with filename if clipped. 'file' variable type reads file contents (size-capped), 'path' type passes raw path string.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:46:31.685428973-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:28:44.106950636-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:28:44.106950636-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented --fill flag, file/path variable types, improved context handling with truncation notes","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6gx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:15.95483587-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-8s6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:15.982490488-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
